name: Cannellini Beans with Italian Sausage
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Cannellini beans (16 oz. each), rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in an ovenproof, flameproof medium casserole.
2. Sauté sausages for 15 minutes until heated through.
3. Drain off excess fat from the sausages.
4. Add garlic and sage, then continue to sauté until the garlic is golden.
5. Cool the sausages and slice them into 1 1/2-inch pieces.
6. Add chopped tomatoes and beans to the casserole.
7. Simmer until well cooked, about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve and enjoy.
Note: The dish can be held in the oven at 300 degrees for up to 30 minutes if needed.
